name: Ruluvian
archetype: Arcanist, enigmatic scholar from distant lands
speech_patterns: References obscure magical theories and foreign concepts
Trails off mid-sentence when distracted by magical phenomena
Uses archaic or unusual word choices
quirks: Stops to examine magical auras at inconvenient times
example_phrases: The aetherial currents here are... unsettling. As though the veil remembers something we have forgotten.
In the scrolls of Keth'azaran, such creatures were said to be bound by moonsilver. Perhaps...
Fascinating. The mana signature suggests a convergence point. We should proceed with... ah, never mind.
By the Thirteen Principles, I did not expect to witness such a phenomenon in this lifetime.
The portents speak of change. Whether fortune or ruin, I cannot yet discern.
